scripts.start:ai: cd ai-service && set AI_SERVICE_PORT=8008&& npm start
scripts.start:backends: concurrently -n gw,user,prod,cart,ord,pay,inv,notif,ai "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:cart" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:inventory" "npm run start:notification" "npm run start:ai"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n gw,user,prod,cart,ord,pay,inv,notif,ai,ui "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:cart" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:inventory" "npm run start:notification" "npm run start:ai" "npm run start:dashboard"
